headline: Leidos (LDOS) Faces DHA Move To Replace It On Military Health Records
summary: Defense Health Agency plans to replace Leidos Holdings (NYSE:LDOS) as lead systems integrator for the Military Health System electronic health record program. Change affects the company’s role in the multi year MHS GENESIS rollout across U.S. military treatment facilities. Decision introduces uncertainty for Leidos’ health segment and its position in the federal health IT market. Analysts have issued downgrades citing concerns about profit margins and organic growth alongside this contract...

headline: UniQure, Aehr Test Systems surge premarket; Snap, Leidos fall
summary: Investing.com - U.S. stock futures were broadly steady on Wednesday as investors geared up for a key Federal Reserve interest rate decision and monitored reports on the details of a preliminary Middle East peace agreement.

headline: B of A Securities Downgrades Leidos Holdings to Neutral, Lowers Price Target to $125
summary: B of A Securities  analyst Mariana Perez   downgrades Leidos Holdings (NYSE:LDOS) from Buy to Neutral and lowers the price target from $200 to $125.
